title: Inbox time savers

posts.author: MK1 (Michael Kresner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi it would be great if you could introduce some additional functionality to make it easier to stay up to date with your inbox.

At the moment you can filter by board, but that is it. Can you introduce a way that you can close all messages to do with a specific item as well, or search within a particular boards inbox so you can use the close all function once a search is applied?
